Enumeration Case# kIOFWMustBeRoot

macOS 10.12+

```
kIOFWMustBeRoot = (1 << 5)
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1645951-anonymous/kiofwmustberoot#discussion)

Attempt to make this device root, There is no guarentee Mac OS will succeed in making the device root.
